reason: Frontend spec entry point for required pre-development checklist.
Uses Zustand history/project stores and must follow existing global state patterns.
History UI scans and filters must avoid known hot-path quality issues.
New props/actions should preserve strict TypeScript typing.
Feature crosses TerminalTabs, HistoryWorkspace, store, and backend invoke parameters.
Reuse existing projectPathFilter/openHistory/loadSessions patterns instead of duplicate state.
